evals.prompt: 用 gbro-collage-broll 帮我把这句做成拼贴 B-roll：很多人以为 AI 是来替你思考的，其实它更像一面镜子，会把你问题里的漏洞照出来。
evals.expected_output: At Gate 1, should only propose one clear visual metaphor with key objects, palette and assembly order, then stop for approval. It must not generate an image or call any video model yet.

evals.prompt: 上一轮你给的‘知识卡片通过轨道重新连成网络’隐喻我确认了。继续帮我做静帧，底色不要全是蓝色，素材可以有彩色纸片。
evals.expected_output: At Gate 2, should create a varied-color editorial halftone paper-collage visual spec and final still, save it in the project, show a numbered still contact sheet, and stop for a second approval. It must not call Omni Flash yet.

evals.prompt: 这些彩色拼贴静帧全部通过，帮我继续生成视频。
evals.expected_output: At Gate 3, should first verify the current Vertex project, global location and refreshable ADC credentials. If configured, it should automatically use gemini-omni-flash-preview through Vertex Agent Platform without asking for a model, use exact empty first and approved last frames, generate 5s 9:16 video, strip audio, create contact sheets and verify the end frame. It must not default to Veo.

evals.prompt: 这五条里 1、2、4 的隐喻通过，3 和 5 我还想改。先继续下一步。
evals.expected_output: Should advance only items 1, 2 and 4 to still generation while keeping items 3 and 5 at the metaphor revision gate. It must not generate video for any item.

evals.prompt: 隐喻通过了，但当前环境没有 Codex image_gen。Vertex AI 已经配置好，请继续生成静帧。
evals.expected_output: At Gate 2, should verify the Vertex image fallback environment and generate the still with the fixed gemini-3-pro-image model. It must not ask the user to provide a manual still or silently choose another image model.

evals.prompt: 静帧通过，继续做视频；这台机器还没有配置 Vertex AI。
evals.expected_output: At Gate 3, should stop before any video request, report only the missing Vertex setup items, and guide the user to configure gcloud, GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT, global location, ADC and the Vertex AI API. It should rerun the check after the user confirms setup.
